2606.03203.title: MedCUA-Bench: A Screenshot-Only Benchmark for Clinical Computer-Use Agents
2606.03203.paper_summary: Computer-use agents could automate repetitive screen-based clinical work, but their reliability in medical graphical user interfaces remains largely unvalidated. Existing benchmarks focus on general web or desktop tasks and underrepresent medical software, which requires domain knowledge, exhibits markedly different UI design from mainstream applications, lacks public testing environments, and demands safety validation beyond task completion. We introduce MedCUA-Bench, an interactive benchmark for clinical computer-use agents. It covers 18 clinical scenarios across 10 medical domains, reconstructed from real product manuals and open-source medical systems to capture authentic clinical interfaces while avoiding licensing and privacy constraints. Each task ships with paired intent- and step-level goals to disentangle clinical reasoning from UI execution, and is evaluated by a deterministic checker over task completion and five clinical safety dimensions. Across 23 agents, the best closed-source model reaches 54.2% strict success, while all models remain below 9% on the real OpenEMR. Open-source agents average only 2.5%, with the best reaching 16.2%. MedCUA-Bench exposes the gap between current agents and reliable clinical software use, providing a reproducible testbed for future research.
2606.03203.paper_summary_zh: 電腦使用代理可以自動化重複的基於螢幕的臨床工作，但它們在醫療圖形用戶界面中的可靠性仍然在很大程度上未經驗證。現有的基準測試專注於一般的網頁或桌面任務，並且對醫療軟體的代表性不足，因為醫療軟體需要專業知識，展現出與主流應用截然不同的用戶界面設計，缺乏公共測試環境，並且要求超越任務完成的安全驗證。我們介紹了 MedCUA-Bench，一個針對臨床電腦使用代理的互動基準測試。它涵蓋了 10 個醫療領域中的 18 個臨床場景，這些場景是從真實產品手冊和開源醫療系統重建而來，以捕捉真實的臨床界面，同時避免授權和隱私限制。每個任務都附有配對的意圖和步驟級目標，以解開臨床推理與用戶界面執行之間的關聯，並由確定性檢查器在任務完成和五個臨床安全維度上進行評估。在 23 個代理中，最佳的閉源模型達到 54.2% 的嚴格成功率，而所有模型在真實的 OpenEMR 上均低於 9%。開源代理的平均成功率僅為 2.5%，最佳的達到 16.2%。MedCUA-Bench 揭示了當前代理與可靠臨床軟體使用之間的差距，為未來的研究提供了一個可重複的測試平台。
2606.03203.author: Jia Yu et.al.
2606.03203.authors: Jia Yu, Zilong Wang, Xinyang Jiang, Dongsheng Li, Shuo Wang
